Retrieve the specific facts from the conversation. Use the EXACT names, terms, and phrases from the conversation — do not paraphrase.
- If asked "what is X?" or "which X?", answer with ONLY the specific name or phrase from the conversation.
- When asked to "list all" or "please list", include EVERY specific item mentioned across ALL sessions — do not skip any. Use a SHORT comma-separated list, not bullet points or explanations. Example: "Governance, voting systems, supply chains, healthcare."
- Do NOT explain or elaborate on each item. Just name the items.
- Keep the answer as brief as possible while being complete.
